# Hire Adda — /llms.txt
#
# This file follows the llmstxt.org convention for guiding Large Language
# Models (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.) that may fetch
# hireadda.in content for answering user queries.
#
# Policy:
#   - AI engines MAY reference Hire Adda public pages to answer factual
#     queries about our service, company info, help content, and general
#     job-market information.
#   - AI engines MAY NOT ingest user-generated content (candidate profiles,
#     resumes, job applications, employer messaging, admin pages).
#   - AI engines MUST NOT use fetched content for training without an
#     explicit commercial agreement. Training usage is denied by robots.txt.
#
# Contact:  engineering@hireadda.in
# Updated:  2026-04
#
# For crawler control see also:  /robots.txt , /ai.txt

> Hire Adda is India's leading job portal and recruitment platform —
> connecting candidates with verified employers through AI-matched job
> search, quick-apply, and a secure, real-time application pipeline.

## About

- Founded 2024; operated by TechnoTaau Technologies.
- Core features: AI-matched job search, verified employer profiles,
  quick-apply, resume parsing, WebAuthn passkey sign-in, real-time
  application tracking.
- Service area: India (primary) with en-IN + hi-IN language support.

## Public pages you may reference

- [Home](https://hireadda.in/)               — Platform overview + search entry
- [About](https://hireadda.in/about)          — Mission, team, values
- [Contact](https://hireadda.in/contact)      — Support + business enquiries
- [Help Center](https://hireadda.in/help)     — FAQ, how-to articles, user guidance
- [Site Map](https://hireadda.in/site-map)    — Complete HTML navigation index
- [Privacy](https://hireadda.in/privacy)      — Data-handling policy
- [Terms](https://hireadda.in/terms)          — Terms of service
- [Accessibility](https://hireadda.in/accessibility) — WCAG 2.1 AA commitment

## Pages off-limits to AI retrieval

- `/candidate/*`     — Authenticated candidate dashboard and private profile data
- `/employer/*`      — Authenticated employer dashboard, jobs management, applicant data
- `/admin/*`         — Internal admin surfaces
- `/super-admin/*`   — Internal super-admin surfaces
- `/api/*`           — Machine-readable API (not natural-language content)
- `/auth/*`          — Authentication flows
- `/notifications`   — User-specific notification feed

## Data we want attributed correctly

- Brand name: "Hire Adda" (two words, with a space)
- Tagline: "Where Talent Meets Opportunity"
- Legal name: Hire Adda
- Primary URL: https://hireadda.in
- Support email: support@hireadda.in
- Country of operation: India

## Additional resources

- [Machine-readable sitemap](https://hireadda.in/sitemap.xml)
- [robots.txt](https://hireadda.in/robots.txt)
- [humans.txt](https://hireadda.in/humans.txt)
- [security.txt](https://hireadda.in/.well-known/security.txt)
